# Shopify Functions Reference (Indonesian / English)

> Referensi lengkap **Functions** Shopify API yang disusun ulang dari https://shopify.dev/docs/api/functions.
> Dokumen ini dirancang untuk pengembang berbahasa Indonesia, namun seluruh konten teknis (skema, tipe, nama field, contoh kode) dipertahankan dalam bahasa Inggris asli untuk memastikan akurasi.

| Item | Nilai |
|------|-------|
| Sumber | `https://shopify.dev/docs/api/functions` |
| Total halaman | **12** |
| Tanggal kompilasi | 2026-05-01 |
| Bahasa | Indonesia (intro/ToC) + English (konten teknis) |

href="https://cdn.shopify.com/shopifycloud/shopify-dev/production/assets/LiquidExample-0AZ9fRv4.js"/><script>
              self.getThemeMode = () => {
                for (const cookie of document.cookie.split(';')) {
                  const [key, value] = cookie
                    .trim()
                    .split('=')
                    .map((value) => decodeURIComponent(value));

                  if (key === 'theme_mode') {
                    if (value === 'ThemeMode-dark') return 'dark';
                    if (value === 'ThemeMode-default') return 'light';
                  }
                }

                if (matchMedia('(prefers-color-scheme: dark)').matches) return 'dark';
                return 'light';
              };

              self.setThemeMode = (mode) => {
                const cookieValue = mode === 'dark' ? 'ThemeMode-dark' : 'ThemeMode-default';
                document.cookie = `theme_mode=${cookieValue}; path=/`;
              };

              try {
                if (getThemeMode() === 'dark') {
                  document.documentElement.classList.remove('Mode-Light');
                  document.documentElement.classList.add('Mode-Dark');
                }
              } catch (_) {}
            </script><link rel="stylesheet" href="https://cdn.shopify.com/shopifycloud/shopify-dev/production/assets/root-zkBpNKG-.css"/><link rel="stylesheet"   </style><div class="_PageHero_1k7lv_1 _Hero_14vd5_1"><figure class="pixelate _PageHeroImage_1k7lv_30 _HeroImage_14vd5_9 _HeroImage_14vd5_9-httpscdnshopifycomshopifycloudshopify-devproductionassetsassetsimagesfunctions-hero-light-cDXOyDb3pnghttpscdnshopifycomshopifycloudshopify-devproductionassetsassetsimagesfunctions-hero-dark-CrEmUm06png"></figure><div class="_PageLayoutConstraints_1vcwt_1"><div class="_PageLayoutConstraintsInner_1vcwt_14"><div class="_PageHeroContentLayout_1k7lv_51"><div class="_PageHeroContentColumn_1k7lv_66"><div class="_HeroTextContent_14vd5_38 _HeroNotice_14vd5_71"><h1 class="_HeroTextHeadline_14vd5_47">Function APIs</h1><p><a href="/docs/api/functions/current">Shopify Functions</a> enable you to customize Shopify&#x27;s backend logic by running custom code during the checkout process. You can create functions to implement specialized features that aren&#x27;t available natively.</p><p>For example, you can generate custom delivery options, create new types of discounts, and provide your own validation of a cart and checkout.</p><p>When you build a function, prioritize performance. Functions run in the context of key purchase flows, like discounts and checkout. Delays can negatively impact the Shopify backend and prevent customers from making purchases.</p><div class="_DownloadMarkdownContainer_14jw1_1 _askAILayout_14jw1_6 Theme-AI"><button type="button" class="_Button_9vqk5_2 _sizeSmall_9vqk5_21 _variantBorderless_9vqk5_67 _textAlignCenter_9vqk5_290 _Button_1yqc4_1" aria-label="Ask"><span class="_Icon_9vqk5_191"><svg width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><use href="#ScintillateSmall"></use></svg></span><span class="_Children_9vqk5_315"><span>Ask</span></span></button><span aria-describedby="_R_a9k1cm75_" data-state="closed"><button type="button" class="_Button_9vqk5_2 _sizeSmall_9vqk5_21 _variantBorderless_9vqk5_67 _textAlignCenter_9vqk5_290 _Button_j8i91_1" aria-label="Copy MD"><span class="_Icon_9vqk5_191"><svg width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><use href="#CopySmall"></use></svg></span><span class="_Children_9vqk5_315"><span>Copy MD</span></span></button></span><span aria-describedby="_R_e9k1cm75_" data-state="closed"><button type="button" class="_Button_9vqk5_2 _sizeMedium_9vqk5_35 _variantBorderless_9vqk5_67 _textAlignCenter_9vqk5_290 _IconOnly_9vqk5_222 _DropDownTopLeft_zr1tt_1 _DropDownBottomLeft_zr1tt_6" aria-expanded="false" aria-label="Toggle dropdown"><span class="_Icon_9vqk5_191"><svg width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><use href="#CaretDownSmall"></use></svg></span></button></span></div></div></div></div></div></div></div></div>
<div class="_PageLayoutConstraints_1vcwt_1 _MobileVersionSelector_90qxx_140"><div class="_PageLayoutConstraintsInner_1vcwt_14"><div class="_variantInPage_90qxx_13" style="--accent-hover-color:undefined;--accent-active-color:undefined"><label class="_SelectLabel_90qxx_1" for="versionSelect_R_3cm75_"><span>Choose a version:</span></label><div class="_Select_90qxx_1"><select id="versionSelect_R_3cm75_" class="_Input_90qxx_86" data-version-selector="true"><option value="unstable">unstable<!-- --> </option><option value="2026-07">2026-07<!-- --> <!-- -->release candidate</option><option value="2026-04" selected="">2026-04<!-- --> <!-- -->latest</option><option value="2026-01">2026-01<!-- --> </option><option value="2025-10">2025-10<!-- --> </option><option value="2025-07">2025-07<!-- --> </option></select><div class="_Content_90qxx_60" aria-hidden="true"><span data-markdown="remove" class="_Label_90qxx_118"><span class="_LabelVersion_90qxx_125">2026-04</span><span class="_Tag_90qxx_113 MinorTheme-Success">latest</span></span><span><svg width="20" height="20" aria-hidden="true"><use href="#SelectorMedium"></use></svg></span></div><div class="_Backdrop_90qxx_70"></div></div></div></div></div>
<div class="_SectionList_19vap_1"><div class="_PageLayoutConstraints_1vcwt_1"><div class="_PageLayoutConstraintsInner_1vcwt_14"><section class="_PageSection_fsk7b_1"><div data-testid="primary-column" class="_PageSectionColumn_fsk7b_17"><h2><div id="shopify-cli-scaffold" class="_Wrapper_gm9zu_1 group/hashtarget"><a data-markdown="remove" class="_LinkHashTarget_gm9zu_14" href="/docs/api/functions/latest#shopify-cli-scaffold" data-discover="true"><svg width="20" height="20" aria-hidden="true"><use href="#LinkMedium"></use></svg><span class="visuallyHidden">Anchor to Shopify CLI scaffold</span></a>Shopify CLI scaffold</div></h2><p>Function APIs require a set of essential files, such as TOML configuration, GraphQL schema, GraphQL input query, and function code.</p><p>Use <a href="/docs/api/shopify-cli">Shopify CLI</a> to scaffold the essential elements that you need to get started.</p></div><aside data-testid="secondary-column" class="_PageSectionColumn_fsk7b_17"><div class="_Card_q9ijc_1 _DefaultCard_q9ijc_11 Theme-Docs Mode-Dim _CodeBlockContainer_q9ub5_1 CodeBlockContainerHeight _MdxCodeblock_ebwmn_1"><header class="_CardHeader_q9ijc_107"><div class="_TitleBar_1vdkz_1"><h2 class="_Heading_1vdkz_20"><svg width="16" height="16" class="_Icon_1vdkz_37" aria-hidden="true"><use href="#TerminalSmall"></use></svg>Generate scaffold</h2></div><div class="_CardActionBar_q9ijc_38"><span aria-describedby="_R_2c5cm75_" data-state="closed"><button type="button" class="_CardActionButton_q9ijc_47 _CodeBlockActionButton_q9ub5_21"><svg width="20" height="20" class="_CodeBlockActionIcon_q9ub5_17" aria-hidden="true"><use href="#CopyMedium"></use></svg><span class="_CardActionButtonLabel_q9ijc_79">Copy</span></button></span></div></header><div class="_CodeBlockContent_q9ub5_34"><div data-language="terminal" class="_Editor_1kljl_1" style="--gutter-padding:var(--size-100)"><div><style>
            @layer codemirror {

.ͼ1 {position: relative !important; box-sizing: border-box; display: flex !important; flex-direction: column;}

.ͼ1 .cm-content {margin: 0; flex-grow: 2; flex-shrink: 0; display: block; white-space: pre; word-wrap: normal; box-sizing: border-box; min-height: 100%; padding: 4px 0; outline: none;}

.ͼ2 .cm-content {caret-color: black;}
.ͼ3 .cm-content {caret-color: white;}
.ͼ1 .cm-line {display: block; padding: 0 2px 0 6px;}
.ͼ1 .cm-layer > * {position: absolute;}
.ͼ1 .cm-layer {position: absolute; left: 0; top: 0; contain: size style;}
.ͼ2 .cm-selectionBackground {background: #d9d9d9;}
.ͼ3 .cm-selectionBackground {background: #222;}
.ͼ2.cm-focused > .cm-scroller > .cm-selectionLayer .cm-selectionBackground {background: #d7d4f0;}
.ͼ3.cm-focused > .cm-scroller > .cm-selectionLayer .cm-selectionBackground {background: #233;}
.ͼ1 .cm-cursorLayer {pointer-events: none;}
.ͼ1.cm-focused > .cm-scroller > .cm-cursorLayer {animation: steps(1) cm-blink 1.2s infinite;}

.ͼ1 .cm-cursor, .ͼ1 .cm-dropCursor {border-left: 1.2px solid black; margin-left: -0.6px; pointer-events: none;}
.ͼ1 .cm-cursor {display: none;}
.ͼ3 .cm-cursor {border-left-color: #ddd;}
.ͼ1 .cm-selectionHandle {background-color: currentColor; width: 1.5px;}
.ͼ1 .cm-selectionHandle-start::before, .ͼ1 .cm-selectionHandle-end::before {content: ""; background-color: inherit; border-radius: 50%; width: 8px; height: 8px; position: absolute; left: -3.25px;}
.ͼ1 .cm-selectionHandle-start::before {top: -8px;}
.ͼ1 .cm-selectionHandle-end::before {bottom: -8px;}
.ͼ1 .cm-dropCursor {position: absolute;}
.ͼ1.cm-focused > .cm-scroller > .cm-cursorLayer .cm-cursor {display: block;}
.ͼ1 .cm-iso {unicode-bidi: isolate;}
.ͼ1 .cm-announced {position: fixed; top: -10000px;}

.ͼ2 .cm-specialChar {color: red;}

.ͼ1 .cm-gutters {flex-shrink: 0; display: flex; height: 100%; box-sizing: border-box; z-index: 200;}

.ͼ1 .cm-gutters-after {inset-inline-end: 0;}

.ͼ2 .cm-gutters.cm-gutters-after {border-left-width: 1px;}
.ͼ2 .cm-gutters {background-color: #f5f5f5; color: #6c6c6c; border: 0px solid #ddd;}
.ͼ3 .cm-gutters {background-color: #333338; color: #ccc;}

.ͼ1 .cm-gutterElement {box-sizing: border-box;}
.ͼ1 .cm-lineNumbers .cm-gutterElement {padding: 0 3px 0 5px; min-width: 20px; text-align: right; white-space: nowrap;}
.ͼ2 .cm-activeLineGutter {background-color: #e2f2ff;}
.ͼ3 .cm-activeLineGutter {background-color: #222227;}
.ͼ1 .cm-panels {box-sizing: border-box; position: sticky; left: 0; right: 0; z-index: 300;}

.ͼ1 .cm-dialog label {font-size: 80%;}

.ͼ1 .cm-tab {display: inline-block; overflow: hidden; vertical-align: bottom;}
.ͼ1 .cm-widgetBuffer {vertical-align: text-top; height: 1em; width: 0; display: inline;}
.ͼ1 .cm-placeholder {color: #888; display: inline-block; vertical-align: top; user-select: none;}
.ͼ1 .cm-highlightSpace {background-image: radial-gradient(circle at 50% 55%, #aaa 20%, transparent 5%); background-position: center;}
.ͼ1 .cm-highlightTab {background-image: url('data:image/svg+xml,<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="200" height="20"><path stroke="%23888" stroke-width="1" fill="none" d="M1 10H196L190 5M190 15L196 10M197 4L197 16"/></svg>'); background-size: auto 100%; background-position: right 90%; background-repeat: no-repeat;}
.ͼ1 .cm-trailingSpace {background-color: #ff332255;}
.ͼ1 .cm-button {vertical-align: middle; color: inherit; font-size: 70%; padding: .2em 1em; border-radius: 1px;}
.ͼ2 .cm-button:active {background-image: linear-gradient(#b4b4b4, #d0d3d6);}
.ͼ2 .cm-button {background-image: linear-gradient(#eff1f5, #d9d9df); border: 1px solid #888;}
.ͼ3 .cm-button:active {background-image: linear-gradient(#111, #333);}
.ͼ3 .cm-button {background-image: linear-gradient(#393939, #111); border: 1px solid #888;}
.ͼ1 .cm-textfield {vertical-align: middle; color: inherit; font-size: 70%; border: 1px solid silver; padding: .2em .5em;}
.ͼ2 .cm-textfield {background-color: white;}
.ͼ3 .cm-textfield {border: 1px solid #555; background-color: inherit;}
.ͼ4 .cm-line ::selection, .ͼ4 .cm-line::selection {background-color: transparent !important;}
.ͼ4 .cm-line {caret-color: transparent !important;}
.ͼ4 .cm-content :focus::selection, .ͼ4 .cm-content :focus ::selection {background-color: Highlight !important;}
.ͼ4 .cm-content :focus {caret-color: initial !important;}
.ͼ4 .cm-content {caret-color: transparent !important;}

              .cm-lineNumbers, .cm-foldGutter { visibility: hidden; }

          </style><div><div class="cm-editor ͼ1 ͼ2 ͼ4"><div class="cm-announced" aria-live="polite"></div><div tabindex="-1" class="cm-scroller"><div class="cm-gutters cm-gutters-before" aria-hidden="true" style="min-height: 14px; position: sticky;"><div class="cm-gutter cm-lineNumbers"><div class="cm-gutterElement" style="height: 0px; visibility: hidden; pointer-events: none;"> $</div><div class="cm-gutterElement" style="height: 14px;"> $</div></div></div><div spellcheck="false" autocorrect="off" autocapitalize="off" writingsuggestions="false" translate="no" contenteditable="false" class="cm-content" style="-moz-tab-size: 4;" role="textbox" aria-multiline="true" aria-readonly="true" data-language="bash"><div class="cm-line"><span class="tok-variableName">shopify</span> <span class="tok-variableName">app</span> <span class="tok-variableName">generate</span> <span class="tok-variableName">extension</span></div></div><div class="cm-layer cm-layer-above cm-cursorLayer" aria-hidden="true" style="z-index: 150; animation-duration: 1200ms;"></div><div class="cm-layer cm-selectionLayer" aria-hidden="true" style="z-index: -2;"></div></div></div></div><script>(() => {
  const container2 = document.currentScript.parentElement;
  requestAnimationFrame(() => {
    if (!container2.isConnected) return;
    const lineNumbersContainer = container2.querySelector(
      ".cm-lineNumbers"
    );
    const guttersContainer = container2.querySelector(
      ".cm-gutters"
    );
    if (!guttersContainer || !lineNumbersContainer) return;
    guttersContainer.style.minHeight = "0px";
    const lineNumbers2 = [
      ...container2.querySelectorAll(".cm-lineNumbers .cm-gutterElement")
    ].slice(1);
    const lines = [...container2.querySelectorAll(".cm-content .cm-line")];
    const lineBoxes = lines.map((line) => line.getBoundingClientRect());
    for (const [index2, lineBox] of lineBoxes.entries()) {
      const lineNumber = lineNumbers2[index2];
      lineNumber.style.height = `${lineBox.height}px`;
    }
    lineNumbersContainer.style.visibility = "visible";
  });
})()</script></div></div></div></div></aside></section></div></div></div>
<div class="_PageLayoutConstraints_1vcwt_1"><div class="_PageLayoutConstraintsInner_1vcwt_14"><hr class="_SectionDivider_19vap_15"/></div></div>
<div class="_SectionList_19vap_1"><div class="_PageLayoutConstraints_1vcwt_1"><div class="_PageLayoutConstraintsInner_1vcwt_14"><section class="_PageSection_fsk7b_1"><div data-testid="primary-column" class="_PageSectionColumn_fsk7b_17"><h2><div id="function-execution-order-in-checkout" class="_Wrapper_gm9zu_1 group/hashtarget"><a data-markdown="remove" class="_LinkHashTarget_gm9zu_14" href="/docs/api/functions/latest#function-execution-order-in-checkout" data-discover="true"><svg width="20" height="20" aria-hidden="true"><use href="#LinkMedium"></use></svg><span class="visuallyHidden">Anchor to Function execution order in checkout</span></a>Function execution order in checkout</div></h2><p>When building Shopify Functions, you need to understand where they fit into the checkout process. Functions execute in a
specific sequence during checkout, and each function depends on data from earlier steps. This sequencing is important
because:</p><ul>
<li>Your function&#x27;s input data comes from previous checkout operations.</li>
<li>The logic of your function might change, depending on where it&#x27;s executed during the checkout process.</li>
<li>Understanding this flow helps you build more reliable and efficient functions.</li>
</ul><p>For example, when a customer adds items to their cart and proceeds to checkout, several functions might run in sequence:</p><p>First, functions that change the pricing and presentation of items in a cart run. Then, functions that calculate discounts execute.
Finally, functions that validate the cart contents run.</p><p>Each step builds on the data from previous steps, so that a cart validation function can&#x27;t run until after
discount calculations are complete.</p><p>Use this diagram to help you understand when each function runs during checkout, and plan your function&#x27;s implementation accordingly.</p></div><aside data-testid="secondary-column" class="_PageSectionColumn_fsk7b_17"><figure class="_Diagram_qocdx_1 _LightDiagram_qocdx_28" data-has-dark-diagram="true"><svg width="552" height="786" viewBox="0 0 552 786" fill="none" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink" role="img" aria-labelledby="diagram-title" data-testid="functions-sequencing"><title id="diagram-title">Functions sequencing</title><g filter="url(#filter0_d_7241_152845)"><path d="M0 8C0 3.58172 3.58172 0 8 0H544C548.418 0 552 3.58172 552 8V776C552 780.418 548.418 784 544 class="_PageSection_fsk7b_1"><div data-testid="primary-column" class="_PageSectionColumn_fsk7b_17"><div class="_Accordion_vxzfq_1"><details id="Fetch-target" class="_AccordionItem_vxzfq_9" data-testid="accordion-item-Fetch-target"><summary class="_AccordionHeader_vxzfq_19"><span class="_Label_vxzfq_35" data-markdown-heading="5">Fetch target <span class="_Chip_1tyx3_1 _variantCritical_1tyx3_144 _Borderless_1tyx3_55"><svg width="16" height="16" data-testid="chip-icon" aria-hidden="true"><use href="#LockSmall"></use></svg><span class="_ChipLabel_1tyx3_48">limited access</span></span></span><svg width="16" height="16" class="_Icon_vxzfq_43" aria-hidden="true"><use href="#PlusSmall"></use></svg></summary><div class="MinorTheme-Critical _Framed_i9sw8_48 _Notice_i9sw8_1 _NoticeMargin_15ynr_1" data-testid="notice-restricted" data-markdown="remove"><div class="_Heading_i9sw8_71"><div class="_Icon_i9sw8_52"><span class="DefaultIcon"><svg width="20" height="20" aria-hidden="true"><use href="#LockMedium"></use></svg></span></div><div class="markdown _MarkdownRenderer_1wwby_4 _Label_i9sw8_56">Limited access</div></div><div class="_Body_i9sw8_66"><p>The fetch target is limited to custom apps installed on Enterprise stores. You&#x27;ll also need to <a href="/docs/apps/build/functions/network-access">request network access for Functions</a>, as it&#x27;s not currently available on development stores or in a developer preview. However, there are exceptions for some Function APIs. For information on fetch target access for a specific API, refer to that Function&#x27;s API reference page.</p></div></div><div hidden=""><strong>Limited access:</strong> <p>The fetch target is limited to custom apps installed on Enterprise stores. You&#x27;ll also need to <a href="/docs/apps/build/functions/network-access">request network access for Functions</a>, as it&#x27;s not currently available on development stores or in a developer preview. However, there are exceptions for some Function APIs. For information on fetch target access for a specific API, refer to that Function&#x27;s API reference page.</p></div><p>A mechanism for retrieving the data from a third party provider and passing the data to the run target.</p><p>Shopify calls the fetch target before the run target. Shopify makes the HTTP call on your behalf, which makes the fetch results available to the run target. This ensures that the run target has access to data from an external source.</p><p>Returning a network request is optional if it&#x27;s not necessary for a specific function execution.</p></details><details id="Run-target" open="" class="_AccordionItem_vxzfq_9 _AccordionItemOpen_vxzfq_15" data-testid="accordion-item-Run-target"><summary class="_AccordionHeader_vxzfq_19 _IsOpen_vxzfq_55"><span class="_Label_vxzfq_35" data-markdown-heading="5">Run target</span><svg width="16" height="16" class="_Icon_vxzfq_43 _OpenIcon_vxzfq_51" aria-hidden="true"><use href="#MinusSmall"></use></svg></summary><p>
An extension point that enables you to customize Shopify&#x27;s backend with custom business logic.</p><p>For example, you can prioritize locations for order routing, or create a new type of discount that&#x27;s applied to a product or product variant in the cart.</p><p>The run target uses either Shopify data, hardcoded values, or fetch results from external providers.</p></details></div></div><aside data-testid="secondary-column" class="_PageSectionColumn_fsk7b_17"><div class="_ControlledItemHidden_vxzfq_59 visuallyHidden" aria-hidden="true" data-testid="controlled-item-Fetch-target"><div class="_Card_q9ijc_1 _DefaultCard_q9ijc_11 Theme-Docs Mode-Dim _CodeBlockContainer_q9ub5_1 CodeBlockContainerHeight _MdxCodeblock_ebwmn_1"><header class="_CardHeader_q9ijc_107"><div class="_TitleBar_1vdkz_1"><h2 class="_Heading_1vdkz_20">shopify.extension.toml</h2></div><div class="_CardActionBar_q9ijc_38"><span aria-describedby="_R_15kdcm75_" data-state="closed"><button type="button" class="_CardActionButton_q9ijc_47 _CodeBlockActionButton_q9ub5_21"><svg width="20" height="20" class="_CodeBlockActionIcon_q9ub5_17" aria-hidden="true"><use href="#CopyMedium"></use></svg><span class="_CardActionButtonLabel_q9ijc_79">Copy</span></button></span></div></header><div class="_CodeBlockContent_q9ub5_34"><div data-language="toml" class="_Editor_1kljl_1" style="--gutter-padding:var(--size-100)"><div><style>
            @layer codemirror {
              .ͼ1.cm-focused {outline: 1px dotted #212121;}

  const container2 = document.currentScript.parentElement;
  requestAnimationFrame(() => {
    if (!container2.isConnected) return;
    const lineNumbersContainer = container2.querySelector(
      ".cm-lineNumbers"
    );
    const guttersContainer = container2.querySelector(
      ".cm-gutters"
    );
    if (!guttersContainer || !lineNumbersContainer) return;
    guttersContainer.style.minHeight = "0px";
    const lineNumbers2 = [
      ...container2.querySelectorAll(".cm-lineNumbers .cm-gutterElement")
    ].slice(1);
    const lines = [...container2.querySelectorAll(".cm-content .cm-line")];
    const lineBoxes = lines.map((line) => line.getBoundingClientRect());
    for (const [index2, lineBox] of lineBoxes.entries()) {
      const lineNumber = lineNumbers2[index2];
      lineNumber.style.height = `${lineBox.height}px`;
    }
    lineNumbersContainer.style.visibility = "visible";
  });
})()</script></div></div></div></div></div><div aria-hidden="false" data-testid="controlled-item-Run-target"><div class="_Card_q9ijc_1 _DefaultCard_q9ijc_11 Theme-Docs Mode-Dim _CodeBlockContainer_q9ub5_1 CodeBlockContainerHeight _MdxCodeblock_ebwmn_1"><header class="_CardHeader_q9ijc_107"><div class="_TitleBar_1vdkz_1"><h2 class="_Heading_1vdkz_20">shopify.extension.toml</h2></div><div class="_CardActionBar_q9ijc_38"><span aria-describedby="_R_16kdcm75_" data-state="closed"><button type="button" class="_CardActionButton_q9ijc_47 _CodeBlockActionButton_q9ub5_21"><svg width="20" height="20" class="_CodeBlockActionIcon_q9ub5_17" aria-hidden="true"><use href="#CopyMedium"></use></svg><span class="_CardActionButtonLabel_q9ijc_79">Copy</span></button></span></div></header><div class="_CodeBlockContent_q9ub5_34"><div data-language="toml" class="_Editor_1kljl_1" style="--gutter-padding:var(--size-100)"><div><style>

<div class="_PageLayoutConstraints_1vcwt_1"><div class="_PageLayoutConstraintsInner_1vcwt_14"><hr class="_SectionDivider_19vap_15"/></div></div>
<div class="_SectionList_19vap_1"><div class="_PageLayoutConstraints_1vcwt_1"><div class="_PageLayoutConstraintsInner_1vcwt_14"><section class="_PageSection_fsk7b_1"><div data-testid="primary-column" class="_PageSectionColumn_fsk7b_17"><h2><div id="function-anatomy" class="_Wrapper_gm9zu_1 group/hashtarget"><a data-markdown="remove" class="_LinkHashTarget_gm9zu_14" href="/docs/api/functions/latest#function-anatomy" data-discover="true"><svg width="20" height="20" aria-hidden="true"><use href="#LinkMedium"></use></svg><span class="visuallyHidden">Anchor to Function anatomy</span></a>Function anatomy</div></h2><p>When you create a function, you write a GraphQL input query that defines the shape of your data.
Then you write logic that transforms the input data and returns the output to Shopify.</p><p>Shopify Functions query input data from the schema of a Function API.
The output is also defined by the same Function API schema.</p><p>You can write functions in any language that can compile to WebAssembly (Wasm), although Rust is recommended and strongly preferred.
Refer to the <a href="/docs/apps/build/functions/programming-languages/webassembly-for-functions">WebAssembly API</a> for details.</p></div><aside data-testid="secondary-column" class="_PageLayoutConstraintsInner_1vcwt_14"><section class="_PageSection_fsk7b_1"><div data-testid="primary-column" class="_PageSectionColumn_fsk7b_17"><h3><div id="input" class="_Wrapper_gm9zu_1 group/hashtarget"><a data-markdown="remove" class="_LinkHashTarget_gm9zu_14" href="/docs/api/functions/latest#input" data-discover="true"><svg width="20" height="20" aria-hidden="true"><use href="#LinkMedium"></use></svg><span class="visuallyHidden">Anchor to Input</span></a>Input</div></h3><p>The <code>Input</code> object is the complete GraphQL schema that your function can receive as input. You can specify what input your function needs using an input query. Before calling your target, Shopify runs its associated GraphQL query and passes the resulting JSON data to your target.</p><p>You can specify what input your function needs using an input query.
When you create a function, the Shopify CLI generates a GraphQL file your input query. You can edit the query to request the data you need.
In <code>run.graphql</code> you can edit the query to request the data you need.
The structure of the JSON input in <code>input.json</code> then matches the shape of that query.</p><p>You can customize input queries using <a href="/docs/apps/build/functions/input-queries/metafields-for-input-queries">metafields</a>, <a href="/docs/apps/build/metaobjects#use-in-shopify-functions">app-owned metaobjects</a>, or <a href="/docs/apps/build/functions/input-queries/use-variables-input-queries">input variables</a>.
Each <a href="#function-extension-target-types">target</a> that your function extension implements can have a unique input query.</p></div><aside data-testid="secondary-column" class="_PageSectionColumn_fsk7b_17"><div class="_Card_q9ijc_1 _DefaultCard_q9ijc_11 Theme-Docs Mode-Dim _CodeBlockContainer_q9ub5_1 CodeBlockContainerHeight _MdxCodeblock_ebwmn_1 Theme-GQL"><header style="--gutter-padding:var(--size-100)"><div><style>
            @layer codemirror {
              .ͼ1.cm-focused {outline: 1px dotted #212121;}
.ͼ1 {position: relative !important; box-sizing: border-box; display: flex !important; flex-direction: column;}
.ͼ1 .cm-scroller {display: flex !important; align-items: flex-start !important; font-family: monospace; line-height: 1.4; height: 100%; overflow-x: auto; position: relative; z-index: 0; overflow-anchor: none;}
.ͼ1 .cm-content[contenteditable=true] {-webkit-user-modify: read-write-plaintext-only;}
.ͼ1 .cm-content {margin: 0; flex-grow: 2; flex-shrink: 0; display: block; white-space: pre; word-wrap: normal; box-sizing: border-box; min-height: 100%; padding: 4px 0; outline: none;}
.ͼ1 .cm-lineWrapping {white-space: pre-wrap; white-space: break-spaces; word-break: break-word; overflow-wrap: anywhere; flex-shrink: 1;}
.ͼ2 .cm-content {caret-color: black;}
.ͼ3 .cm-content {caret-color: white;}
.ͼ1 .cm-line {display: block; padding: 0 2px 0 6px;}
.ͼ1 .cm-layer > * {position: absolute;}
.ͼ1 .cm-layer {position: absolute; left: 0; top: 0; contain: size style;}
.ͼ2 .cm-selectionBackground {background: #d9d9d9;}
.ͼ3 .cm-selectionBackground {background: #222;}
.ͼ2.cm-focused > .cm-scroller > .cm-selectionLayer .cm-selectionBackground {background: #d7d4f0;}
.ͼ3.cm-focused > .cm-scroller > .cm-selectionLayer .cm-selectionBackground {background: #233;}
.ͼ1 .cm-cursorLayer {pointer-events: none;}
.ͼ1.cm-focused > .cm-scroller > .cm-cursorLayer {animation: steps(1) cm-blink 1.2s infinite;}
@keyframes cm-blink {50% {opacity: 0;}}
@keyframes cm-blink2 {50% {opacity: 0;}}
.ͼ1 .cm-cursor, .ͼ1 .cm-dropCursor {border-left: 1.2px solid black; margin-left: -0.6px; pointer-events: none;}
.ͼ1 .cm-cursor {display: none;}
.ͼ3 .cm-cursor {border-left-color: #ddd;}
.ͼ1 .cm-selectionHandle {background-color: currentColor; width: 1.5px;}
.ͼ1 .cm-selectionHandle-start::before, .ͼ1 .cm-selectionHandle-end::before {content: ""; background-color: inherit; border-radius: 50%; width: 8px; height: 8px; position: absolute; left: -3.25px;}
.ͼ1 .cm-selectionHandle-start::before {top: -8px;}
.ͼ1 .cm-selectionHandle-end::before {bottom: -8px;}
.ͼ1 .cm-dropCursor {position: absolute;}
.ͼ1.cm-focused > .cm-scroller > .cm-cursorLayer .cm-cursor {display: block;}
.ͼ1 .cm-iso {unicode-bidi: isolate;}
.ͼ1 .cm-announced {position: fixed; top: -10000px;}
@media print {.ͼ1 .cm-announced {display: none;}}
.ͼ2 .cm-activeLine {background-color: #cceeff44;}
.ͼ3 .cm-activeLine {background-color: #99eeff33;}
.ͼ2 .cm-specialChar {color: red;}
.ͼ3 .cm-specialChar {color: #f78;}
.ͼ1 .cm-gutters {flex-shrink: 0; display: flex; height: 100%; box-sizing: border-box; z-index: 200;}
.ͼ1 .cm-gutters-before {inset-inline-start: 0;}
.ͼ1 .cm-gutters-after {inset-inline-end: 0;}
.ͼ2 .cm-gutters.cm-gutters-before {border-right-width: 1px;}
.ͼ2 .cm-gutters.cm-gutters-after {border-left-width: 1px;}
.ͼ2 .cm-gutters {background-color: #f5f5f5; color: #6c6c6c; border: 0px solid #ddd;}
.ͼ3 .cm-gutters {background-color: #333338; color: #ccc;}
.ͼ1 .cm-gutter {display: flex !important; flex-direction: column; flex-shrink: 0; box-sizing: border-box; min-height: 100%; overflow: hidden;}
.ͼ1 .cm-gutterElement {box-sizing: border-box;}
.ͼ1 .cm-lineNumbers .cm-gutterElement {padding: 0 3px 0 5px; min-width: 20px; text-align: right; white-space: nowrap;}
.ͼ2 .cm-activeLineGutter {background-color: #e2f2ff;}
.ͼ3 .cm-activeLineGutter {background-color: #222227;}
.ͼ1 .cm-panels {box-sizing: border-box; position: sticky; left: 0; right: 0; z-index: 300;}
.ͼ2 .cm-panels {background-color: #f5f5f5; color: black;}
.ͼ2 .cm-panels-top {border-bottom: 1px solid #ddd;}
.ͼ2 .cm-panels-bottom {border-top: 1px solid #ddd;}
.ͼ3 .cm-panels {background-color: #333338; color: white;}
.ͼ1 .cm-dialog label {font-size: 80%;}
.ͼ1 .cm-dialog {padding: 2px 19px 4px 6px; position: relative;}
.ͼ1 .cm-dialog-close {position: absolute; top: 3px; right: 4px; background-color: inherit; border: none; font: inherit; font-size: 14px; padding: 0;}
.ͼ1 .cm-tab {display: inline-block; overflow: hidden; vertical-align: bottom;}
.ͼ1 .cm-widgetBuffer {vertical-align: text-top; height: 1em; width: 0; display: inline;}
.ͼ1 .cm-placeholder {color: #888; display: inline-block; vertical-align: top; user-select: none;}
.ͼ1 .cm-highlightSpace {background-image: radial-gradient(circle at 50% 55%, #aaa 20%, transparent 5%); background-position: center;}
.ͼ1 .cm-highlightTab {background-image: url('data:image/svg+xml,<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="200" height="20"><path stroke="%23888" stroke-width="1" fill="none" d="M1 10H196L190 5M190 15L196 10M197 4L197 16"/></svg>'); background-size: auto 100%; background-position: right 90%; background-repeat: no-repeat;}
.ͼ1 .cm-trailingSpace {background-color: #ff332255;}
.ͼ1 .cm-button {vertical-align: middle; color: inherit; font-size: 70%; padding: .2em 1em; border-radius: 1px;}
.ͼ2 .cm-button:active {background-image: linear-gradient(#b4b4b4, #d0d3d6);}
.ͼ2 .cm-button {background-image: linear-gradient(#eff1f5, #d9d9df); border: 1px solid #888;}
.ͼ3 .cm-button:active {background-image: linear-gradient(#111, #333);}
.ͼ3 .cm-button {background-image: linear-gradient(#393939, #111); border: 1px solid #888;}
.ͼ1 .cm-textfield {vertical-align: middle; color: inherit; font-size: 70%; border: 1px solid silver; padding: .2em .5em;}
.ͼ2 .cm-textfield {background-color: white;}
.ͼ3 .cm-textfield {border: 1px solid #555; background-color: inherit;}
.ͼ4 .cm-line ::selection, .ͼ4 .cm-line::selection {background-color: transparent !important;}
.ͼ4 .cm-line {caret-color: transparent !important;}
.ͼ4 .cm-content :focus::selection, .ͼ4 .cm-content :focus ::selection {background-color: Highlight !important;}
.ͼ4 .cm-content :focus {caret-color: initial !important;}
.ͼ4 .cm-content {caret-color: transparent !important;}

              .cm-lineNumbers, .cm-foldGutter { visibility: hidden; }

  const container2 = document.currentScript.parentElement;
  requestAnimationFrame(() => {
    if (!container2.isConnected) return;
    const lineNumbersContainer = container2.querySelector(
      ".cm-lineNumbers"
    );
    const guttersContainer = container2.querySelector(
      ".cm-gutters"
    );
    if (!guttersContainer || !lineNumbersContainer) return;
    guttersContainer.style.minHeight = "0px";
    const lineNumbers2 = [
      ...container2.querySelectorAll(".cm-lineNumbers .cm-gutterElement")
    ].slice(1);
    const lines = [...container2.querySelectorAll(".cm-content .cm-line")];
    const lineBoxes = lines.map((line) => line.getBoundingClientRect());
    for (const [index2, lineBox] of lineBoxes.entries()) {
      const lineNumber = lineNumbers2[index2];
      lineNumber.style.height = `${lineBox.height}px`;
    }
    lineNumbersContainer.style.visibility = "visible";
  });
})()</script></div></div></div></div></div><div data-state="inactive" data-orientation="horizontal" role="tabpanel" aria-labelledby="radix-_R_d4hcm75_-trigger-tab-1" id="radix-_R_d4hcm75_-content-tab-1" tabindex="0" class="_CardTabsContentInner_q9ijc_282"><div data-markdown="remove" class="_TabContentWrapper_q9ub5_93"><div class="_CodeBlockContent_q9ub5_34 _CodeBlockMaxHeight_q9ub5_85"><div data-language="json" class="_Editor_1kljl_1" style="--gutter-padding:var(--size-100)"><div><style>

It transforms your data into an ordered list of operations.</p><p>Each operation specifies the action to take based on your function&#x27;s purpose. Shopify processes your response to present the results, such as available cart line discounts, during the commerce flow.</p><p>Shopify strongly recommends <a href="/docs/apps/build/functions/programming-languages/rust-for-functions">Rust</a> as the most performant language choice to avoid your function failing with large carts.</p></div><aside   const container2 = document.currentScript.parentElement;
  requestAnimationFrame(() => {
    if (!container2.isConnected) return;
    const lineNumbersContainer = container2.querySelector(
      ".cm-lineNumbers"
    );
    const guttersContainer = container2.querySelector(
      ".cm-gutters"
    );
    if (!guttersContainer || !lineNumbersContainer) return;
    guttersContainer.style.minHeight = "0px";
    const lineNumbers2 = [
      ...container2.querySelectorAll(".cm-lineNumbers .cm-gutterElement")
    ].slice(1);
    const lines = [...container2.querySelectorAll(".cm-content .cm-line")];
    const lineBoxes = lines.map((line) => line.getBoundingClientRect());
    for (const [index2, lineBox] of lineBoxes.entries()) {
      const lineNumber = lineNumbers2[index2];
      lineNumber.style.height = `${lineBox.height}px`;
    }
    lineNumbersContainer.style.visibility = "visible";
  });
})()</script></div></div></div></div></div><div data-state="inactive" data-orientation="horizontal" role="tabpanel" aria-labelledby="radix-_R_d6hcm75_-trigger-tab-1" id="radix-_R_d6hcm75_-content-tab-1" tabindex="0" class="_CardTabsContentInner_q9ijc_282"><div data-markdown="remove" class="_TabContentWrapper_q9ub5_93"><div class="_CodeBlockContent_q9ub5_34 _CodeBlockMaxHeight_q9ub5_85"><div data-language="javascript" class="_Editor_1kljl_1" style="--gutter-padding:var(--size-100)"><div><style>

Each Function API <a href="/docs/apps/build/app-extensions/configure-app-extensions#targets">extension target</a> specifies the shape of the function&#x27;s output using a GraphQL type.
Function output is a declarative object which represents operations for Shopify to execute.</p><p>Function APIs produce different output operations as a result of a function run.
Each Function API reference provides information on available targets, and their associated output GraphQL type.</p></div><aside data-testid="secondary-column" class="_PageSectionColumn_fsk7b_17"><div class="_Card_q9ijc_1 _DefaultCard_q9ijc_11 Theme-Docs Mode-Dim _CodeBlockContainer_q9ub5_1 CodeBlockContainerHeight Theme-GQL _MdxCodeblock_ebwmn_1"><header class="_CardHeader_q9ijc_107"><div class="_TitleBar_1vdkz_1"><h2 class="_Heading_1vdkz_20">Output structure</h2><span><div class="_ChipContainer_4osk3_6"><span class="_ChipLabel_4osk3_26">JSON</span></div></span></div><div class="_CardActionBar_q9ijc_38"><span aria-describedby="_R_j8hcm75_" data-state="closed"><button type="button" class="_CardActionButton_q9ijc_47 _CodeBlockActionButton_q9ub5_21"><svg width="20" height="20" class="_CodeBlockActionIcon_q9ub5_17" aria-hidden="true"><use href="#CopyMedium"></use></svg><span class="_CardActionButtonLabel_q9ijc_79">Copy</span></button></span></div></header><div class="_CodeBlockContent_q9ub5_34"><div data-language="json" class="_Editor_1kljl_1" style="--gutter-padding:var(--size-100)"><div><style>

            }
          </style><div><div class="cm-editor ͼ1 ͼ2 ͼ4"><div class="cm-announced" aria-live="polite"></div><div tabindex="-1" class="cm-scroller"><div class="cm-gutters cm-gutters-before" aria-hidden="true" style="min-height: 126px; position: sticky;"><div class="cm-gutter cm-lineNumbers"><div class="cm-gutterElement" style="height: 0px; visibility: hidden; pointer-events: none;">9</div><div class="cm-gutterElement" style="height: 14px;">1</div><div class="cm-gutterElement" style="height: 14px;">2</div><div class="cm-gutterElement" style="height: 14px;">3</div><div class="cm-gutterElement" style="height: 14px;">4</div><div class="cm-gutterElement" style="height: 14px;">5</div><div class="cm-gutterElement" style="height: 14px;">6</div><div class="cm-gutterElement" style="height: 14px;">7</div><div class="cm-gutterElement" style="height: 14px;">8</div><div class="cm-gutterElement" style="height: 14px;">9</div></div></div><div spellcheck="false" autocorrect="off" autocapitalize="off" writingsuggestions="false" translate="no" contenteditable="false" class="cm-content" style="-moz-tab-size: 4;" role="textbox" aria-multiline="true" aria-readonly="true" data-language="json"><div class="cm-line"><span class="tok-punctuation">{</span></div><div class="cm-line">  <span class="tok-propertyName">"operations"</span><span class="tok-punctuation">:</span> <span class="tok-punctuation">[</span></div><div class="cm-line">    <span class="tok-punctuation">{</span></div><div class="cm-line">      <span class="tok-propertyName">"operations_field"</span><span class="tok-punctuation">:</span> <span class="tok-punctuation">{</span></div><div class="cm-line">        <span class="tok-propertyName">"field"</span><span class="tok-punctuation">:</span> <span class="tok-string">"value"</span></div><div class="cm-line">      <span class="tok-punctuation">}</span></div><div class="cm-line">    <span class="tok-punctuation">}</span></div><div class="cm-line">  <span class="tok-punctuation">]</span></div><div class="cm-line"><span class="tok-punctuation">}</span></div></div><div class="cm-layer cm-layer-above cm-cursorLayer" aria-hidden="true" style="z-index: 150; animation-duration: 1200ms;"></div><div class="cm-layer cm-selectionLayer" aria-hidden="true" style="z-index: -2;"></div></div></div></div><script>(() => {
  const container2 = document.currentScript.parentElement;
  requestAnimationFrame(() => {
    if (!container2.isConnected) return;
    const lineNumbersContainer = container2.querySelector(
      ".cm-lineNumbers"
    );
    const guttersContainer = container2.querySelector(
      ".cm-gutters"
    );
    if (!guttersContainer || !lineNumbersContainer) return;
    guttersContainer.style.minHeight = "0px";
    const lineNumbers2 = [
      ...container2.querySelectorAll(".cm-lineNumbers .cm-gutterElement")
    ].slice(1);
    const lines = [...container2.querySelectorAll(".cm-content .cm-line")];
    const lineBoxes = lines.map((line) => line.getBoundingClientRect());
    for (const [index2, lineBox] of lineBoxes.entries()) {
      const lineNumber = lineNumbers2[index2];
      lineNumber.style.height = `${lineBox.height}px`;
    }
    lineNumbersContainer.style.visibility = "visible";
  });
})()</script></div></div></div></div></aside></section></div></div></div>
<div class="_PageLayoutConstraints_1vcwt_1"><div class="_PageLayoutConstraintsInner_1vcwt_14"><hr class="_SectionDivider_19vap_15"/></div></div>
<div class="_SectionList_19vap_1"><div class="_PageLayoutConstraints_1vcwt_1"><div class="_PageLayoutConstraintsInner_1vcwt_14"><section class="_PageSection_fsk7b_1"><div data-testid="primary-column" class="_PageSectionColumn_fsk7b_17"><h2><div id="configuration" class="_Wrapper_gm9zu_1 group/hashtarget"><a data-markdown="remove" class="_LinkHashTarget_gm9zu_14" href="/docs/api/functions/latest#configuration" data-discover="true"><svg width="20" height="20" aria-hidden="true"><use href="#LinkMedium"></use></svg><span class="visuallyHidden">Anchor to Configuration</span></a>Configuration</div></h2><p>Functions rely on a <code>shopify.extension.toml</code> file that contains the extension&#x27;s configuration. This includes the extension name, type, API version, UI paths, build configuration, and metafields for query variables.</p><p>The <code>name</code> value is what displays in the Shopify admin to merchants, so consider this value carefully. We recommend that the <code>api_version</code> reflects the latest supported API version.</p><h3><div id="properties" class="_Wrapper_gm9zu_1 group/hashtarget"><a data-markdown="remove" class="_LinkHashTarget_gm9zu_14" href="/docs/api/functions/latest#properties" data-discover="true"><svg width="20" height="20" aria-hidden="true"><use href="#LinkMedium"></use></svg><span class="visuallyHidden">Anchor to Properties</span></a>Properties</div></h3><p>Functions use <a href="/docs/apps/build/app-extensions/configure-app-extensions#common-properties">common configuration properties</a> for app extensions. Additionally, the following properties in <code>shopify.extension.toml</code> are specific to Shopify Functions extensions:</p><div class="_Accordion_vxzfq_1"><details id="[[extensions.targeting]]" class="_AccordionItem_vxzfq_9" data-testid="accordion-item-[[extensions.targeting]]"><summary class="_AccordionHeader_vxzfq_19"><span class="_Label_vxzfq_35" data-markdown-heading="5"><code>[[extensions.targeting]]</code> <span class="_Chip_1tyx3_1 _variantCritical_1tyx3_144 _Borderless_1tyx3_55 _Transparent_1tyx3_35 _Monofont_1tyx3_44"><span class="_ChipLabel_1tyx3_48">required</span></span></span><svg width="16" height="16" class="_Icon_vxzfq_43" aria-hidden="true"><use href="#PlusSmall"></use></svg></summary><p>
The name of the array that contains a target and its associated <a href="/docs/apps/build/functions/programming-languages/webassembly-for-functions">WebAssembly</a> module export. Contains the following properties:</p><ul>
<li>
<p><code>target</code>: <span class="_Chip_1tyx3_1 _variantCritical_1tyx3_144 _Borderless_1tyx3_55 _Transparent_1tyx3_35 _Monofont_1tyx3_44"><span class="_ChipLabel_1tyx3_48">required</span></span></p>
<p>An identifier that specifies where you&#x27;re injecting code into the Shopify backend.</p>
</li>
<li>
<p><code>input_query</code>: <span class="_Chip_1tyx3_1 _variantDefault_1tyx3_60 _Borderless_1tyx3_55 _Transparent_1tyx3_35 _Monofont_1tyx3_44"><span class="_ChipLabel_1tyx3_48">optional</span></span></p>
<p>The path to the <a href="/docs/api/functions/2026-04#input">input query</a> file for the target. If omitted, then the function receives no input.</p>
</li>
<li>
<p><code>export</code>: <span class="_Chip_1tyx3_1 _variantDefault_1tyx3_60 _Borderless_1tyx3_55 _Transparent_1tyx3_35 _Monofont_1tyx3_44"><span class="_ChipLabel_1tyx3_48">optional</span></span></p>
<p>The name of the <a href="/docs/apps/build/functions/programming-languages/webassembly-for-functions">WebAssembly</a> export in your module that executes the target.</p>
<p>Functions don&#x27;t use the <code>extensions.targeting.module</code> setting. Use <code>export</code> instead. Defaults to <code>_start</code>.</p>
</li>
</ul></details><details id="[extensions.build]" class="_AccordionItem_vxzfq_9" data-testid="accordion-item-[extensions.build]"><summary class="_AccordionHeader_vxzfq_19"><span class="_Label_vxzfq_35" data-markdown-heading="5"><code>[extensions.build]</code> <span class="_Chip_1tyx3_1 _variantDefault_1tyx3_60 _Borderless_1tyx3_55 _Transparent_1tyx3_35 _Monofont_1tyx3_44"><span class="_ChipLabel_1tyx3_48">optional</span></span></span><svg width="16" height="16" class="_Icon_vxzfq_43" aria-hidden="true"><use href="#PlusSmall"></use></svg></summary><p>
The settings related to the build and deployment of the function extension&#x27;s WebAssembly module. Contains the following properties:</p><ul>
<li>
<p><code>command</code>: <span class="_Chip_1tyx3_1 _variantCritical_1tyx3_144 _Borderless_1tyx3_55 _Transparent_1tyx3_35 _Monofont_1tyx3_44"><span class="_ChipLabel_1tyx3_48">required</span></span></p>
<p>The command to build the function, which is invoked by the Shopify CLI build command. This setting can be omitted for JavaScript.</p>
</li>
<li>
<p><code>path</code>: <span class="_Chip_1tyx3_1 _variantDefault_1tyx3_60 _Borderless_1tyx3_55 _Transparent_1tyx3_35 _Monofont_1tyx3_44"><span class="_ChipLabel_1tyx3_48">optional</span></span></p>
<p>The relative path to the function&#x27;s <a href="/docs/apps/build/functions/programming-languages/webassembly-for-functions">WebAssembly</a> module. For example, <code>build/my-module.wasm</code>. Defaults to <code>dist/index.wasm</code>.</p>
</li>
<li>
<p><code>watch</code>: <span class="_Chip_1tyx3_1 _variantDefault_1tyx3_60 _Borderless_1tyx3_55 _Transparent_1tyx3_35 _Monofont_1tyx3_44"><span class="_ChipLabel_1tyx3_48">optional</span></span></p>
<p>The relative paths that Shopify CLI should watch when the dev command is invoked. Changes to matched files will trigger a build of the function and update it in your application drafts. This setting accepts a single file path or glob pattern, or an array of file paths and glob patterns.</p>
<p>For JavaScript and TypeScript functions, this setting defaults to <code>[&#x27;src/**/*.js&#x27;, &#x27;src/**/*.ts&#x27;]</code>.</p>
<p>Only paths inside the function directory are allowed. Don&#x27;t use <code>../</code> (no parent directory references).</p>
<p><a href="/docs/apps/build/functions/input-queries/metafields-for-input-queries">Input queries</a> are automatically included in watch paths and don&#x27;t need to be configured in <code>build.watch</code>.</p>
</li>
<li>
<p><code>wasm_opt</code>: <span class="_Chip_1tyx3_1 _variantDefault_1tyx3_60 _Borderless_1tyx3_55 _Transparent_1tyx3_35 _Monofont_1tyx3_44"><span class="_ChipLabel_1tyx3_48">optional</span></span></p>
<p>Whether to optimize your module before upload. Defaults to <code>true</code>.</p>
</li>
</ul></details><details id="[extensions.ui]" class="_AccordionItem_vxzfq_9" data-testid="accordion-item-[extensions.ui]"><summary class="_AccordionHeader_vxzfq_19"><span class="_Label_vxzfq_35" data-markdown-heading="5"><code>[extensions.ui]</code> <span class="_Chip_1tyx3_1 _variantDefault_1tyx3_60 _Borderless_1tyx3_55 _Transparent_1tyx3_35 _Monofont_1tyx3_44"><span class="_ChipLabel_1tyx3_48">optional</span></span></span><svg width="16" height="16" class="_Icon_vxzfq_43" aria-hidden="true"><use href="#PlusSmall"></use></svg></summary><p>
The settings related to the <a href="/docs/apps/build/functions/input-queries/metafields-for-input-queries#creating-your-merchant-interface">merchant interface</a> for your function. Contains the following properties:</p><ul>
<li>
<p><code>handle</code>: <span class="_Chip_1tyx3_1 _variantDefault_1tyx3_60 _Borderless_1tyx3_55 _Transparent_1tyx3_35 _Monofont_1tyx3_44"><span class="_ChipLabel_1tyx3_48">optional</span></span></p>
<p>The handle of another UI extension in your app that serves as the Shopify admin for merchants to configure that function. Learn how to create your <a href="/docs/apps/build/functions/input-queries/metafields-for-input-queries#creating-your-merchant-interface">function&#x27;s merchant interface</a>.</p>
</li>
<li>
<p><code>enable_create</code>: <span class="_Chip_1tyx3_1 _variantDefault_1tyx3_60 _Borderless_1tyx3_55 _Transparent_1tyx3_35 _Monofont_1tyx3_44"><span class="_ChipLabel_1tyx3_48">optional</span></span></p>
<p>Whether the function displays in the Shopify admin to merchants to create workflows. Learn how to <a href="/docs/apps/build/functions/input-queries/metafields-for-input-queries#configuring-creation-workflows-for-function-owners">configure creation workflows for function owners</a>.</p>
</li>
</ul></details><details id="[extensions.ui.paths]" class="_AccordionItem_vxzfq_9" data-testid="accordion-item-[extensions.ui.paths]"><summary class="_AccordionHeader_vxzfq_19"><span class="_Label_vxzfq_35" data-markdown-heading="5"><code>[extensions.ui.paths]</code> <span class="_Chip_1tyx3_1 _variantDefault_1tyx3_60 _Borderless_1tyx3_55 _Transparent_1tyx3_35 _Monofont_1tyx3_44"><span class="_ChipLabel_1tyx3_48">optional</span></span></span><svg width="16" height="16" class="_Icon_vxzfq_43" aria-hidden="true"><use href="#PlusSmall"></use></svg></summary><p>
The settings related to the App Bridge paths of the <a href="/docs/apps/build/functions/input-queries/metafields-for-input-queries#creating-your-merchant-interface">merchant interface</a> for your function. Contains the following properties:</p><ul>
<li>
<p><code>create</code>: <span class="_Chip_1tyx3_1 _variantDefault_1tyx3_60 _Borderless_1tyx3_55 _Transparent_1tyx3_35 _Monofont_1tyx3_44"><span class="_ChipLabel_1tyx3_48">optional</span></span></p>
<p>The path within your app that&#x27;s launched when a merchant clicks on creating a new customization with this function. Learn how to create your <a href="/docs/apps/build/functions/input-queries/metafields-for-input-queries#creating-your-merchant-interface">function&#x27;s merchant interface</a>.</p>
</li>
<li>
<p><code>details</code>: <span class="_Chip_1tyx3_1 _variantDefault_1tyx3_60 _Borderless_1tyx3_55 _Transparent_1tyx3_35 _Monofont_1tyx3_44"><span class="_ChipLabel_1tyx3_48">optional</span></span></p>
<p>The edit path that launches when a merchant clicks customization. Learn how to create your <a href="/docs/apps/build/functions/input-queries/metafields-for-input-queries#creating-your-merchant-interface">function&#x27;s merchant interface</a>.</p>
</li>
</ul></details><details id="[extensions.input.variables]" class="_AccordionItem_vxzfq_9" data-testid="accordion-item-[extensions.input.variables]"><summary class="_AccordionHeader_vxzfq_19"><span class="_Label_vxzfq_35" data-markdown-heading="5"><code>[extensions.input.variables]</code> <span class="_Chip_1tyx3_1 _variantDefault_1tyx3_60 _Borderless_1tyx3_55 _Transparent_1tyx3_35 _Monofont_1tyx3_44"><span class="_ChipLabel_1tyx3_48">optional</span></span></span><svg width="16" height="16" class="_Icon_vxzfq_43" aria-hidden="true"><use href="#PlusSmall"></use></svg></summary><p>
The <a href="/docs/apps/build/functions/input-queries/use-variables-input-queries">variables to use in your input query</a>. A means of inserting the dynamic values in the input query if you use <code>hasTags</code> and <code>hasCollections</code>. Contains the following properties:</p><ul>
<li>
<p><code>namespace</code>: <span class="_Chip_1tyx3_1 _variantDefault_1tyx3_60 _Borderless_1tyx3_55 _Transparent_1tyx3_35 _Monofont_1tyx3_44"><span class="_ChipLabel_1tyx3_48">optional</span></span></p>
<p>A container for a group of metafields. Grouping metafields within a namespace prevents your metafields from conflicting with other metafields with the same key name.</p>
</li>
<li>
<p><code>key</code>: <span class="_Chip_1tyx3_1 _variantDefault_1tyx3_60 _Borderless_1tyx3_55 _Transparent_1tyx3_35 _Monofont_1tyx3_44"><span class="_ChipLabel_1tyx3_48">optional</span></span></p>
<p>The name for the metafield.</p>
</li>
</ul></details></div></div><aside data-testid="secondary-column" class="_PageSectionColumn_fsk7b_17"><div class="_Card_q9ijc_1 _DefaultCard_q9ijc_11 Theme-Docs Mode-Dim _CodeBlockContainer_q9ub5_1 CodeBlockContainerHeight _MdxCodeblock_ebwmn_1"><header class="_CardHeader_q9ijc_107"><div class="_TitleBar_1vdkz_1"><h2 class="_Heading_1vdkz_20">shopify.extension.toml</h2></div><div class="_CardActionBar_q9ijc_38"><span aria-describedby="_R_2clcm75_" data-state="closed"><button type="button" class="_CardActionButton_q9ijc_47 _CodeBlockActionButton_q9ub5_21"><svg width="20" height="20" class="_CodeBlockActionIcon_q9ub5_17" aria-hidden="true"><use href="#CopyMedium"></use></svg><span class="_CardActionButtonLabel_q9ijc_79">Copy</span></button></span></div></header><div class="_CodeBlockContent_q9ub5_34"><div data-language="toml" class="_Editor_1kljl_1" style="--gutter-padding:var(--size-200)"><div><style>
            @layer codemirror {
              .ͼ1.cm-focused {outline: 1px dotted #212121;}
.ͼ1 {position: relative !important; box-sizing: border-box; display: flex !important; flex-direction: column;}

.ͼ1 .cm-content[contenteditable=true] {-webkit-user-modify: read-write-plaintext-only;}

.ͼ1 .cm-lineWrapping {white-space: pre-wrap; white-space: break-spaces; word-break: break-word; overflow-wrap: anywhere; flex-shrink: 1;}

@keyframes cm-blink2 {50% {opacity: 0;}}
.ͼ1 .cm-cursor, .ͼ1 .cm-dropCursor {border-left: 1.2px solid black; margin-left: -0.6px; pointer-events: none;}

.ͼ1 .cm-selectionHandle-start::before, .ͼ1 .cm-selectionHandle-end::before {content: ""; background-color: inherit; border-radius: 50%; width: 8px; height: 8px; position: absolute; left: -3.25px;}
.ͼ1 .cm-selectionHandle-start::before {top: -8px;}
.ͼ1 .cm-selectionHandle-end::before {bottom: -8px;}
.ͼ1 .cm-dropCursor {position: absolute;}
.ͼ1.cm-focused > .cm-scroller > .cm-cursorLayer .cm-cursor {display: block;}
.ͼ1 .cm-iso {unicode-bidi: isolate;}
.ͼ1 .cm-announced {position: fixed; top: -10000px;}
@media print {.ͼ1 .cm-announced {display: none;}}
.ͼ2 .cm-activeLine {background-color: #cceeff44;}
.ͼ3 .cm-activeLine {background-color: #99eeff33;}
.ͼ2 .cm-specialChar {color: red;}
.ͼ3 .cm-specialChar {color: #f78;}
.ͼ1 .cm-gutters {flex-shrink: 0; display: flex; height: 100%; box-sizing: border-box; z-index: 200;}
.ͼ1 .cm-gutters-before {inset-inline-start: 0;}
.ͼ1 .cm-gutters-after {inset-inline-end: 0;}
.ͼ2 .cm-gutters.cm-gutters-before {border-right-width: 1px;}
.ͼ2 .cm-gutters.cm-gutters-after {border-left-width: 1px;}
.ͼ2 .cm-gutters {background-color: #f5f5f5; color: #6c6c6c; border: 0px solid #ddd;}
.ͼ3 .cm-gutters {background-color: #333338; color: #ccc;}
.ͼ1 .cm-gutter {display: flex !important; flex-direction: column; flex-shrink: 0; box-sizing: border-box; min-height: 100%; overflow: hidden;}
.ͼ1 .cm-gutterElement {box-sizing: border-box;}
.ͼ1 .cm-lineNumbers .cm-gutterElement {padding: 0 3px 0 5px; min-width: 20px; text-align: right; white-space: nowrap;}
.ͼ2 .cm-activeLineGutter {background-color: #e2f2ff;}
.ͼ3 .cm-activeLineGutter {background-color: #222227;}
.ͼ1 .cm-panels {box-sizing: border-box; position: sticky; left: 0; right: 0; z-index: 300;}
.ͼ2 .cm-panels {background-color: #f5f5f5; color: black;}
.ͼ2 .cm-panels-top {border-bottom: 1px solid #ddd;}
.ͼ2 .cm-panels-bottom {border-top: 1px solid #ddd;}
.ͼ3 .cm-panels {background-color: #333338; color: white;}
.ͼ1 .cm-dialog label {font-size: 80%;}
.ͼ1 .cm-dialog {padding: 2px 19px 4px 6px; position: relative;}
.ͼ1 .cm-dialog-close {position: absolute; top: 3px; right: 4px; background-color: inherit; border: none; font: inherit; font-size: 14px; padding: 0;}
.ͼ1 .cm-tab {display: inline-block; overflow: hidden; vertical-align: bottom;}
.ͼ1 .cm-widgetBuffer {vertical-align: text-top; height: 1em; width: 0; display: inline;}
.ͼ1 .cm-placeholder {color: #888; display: inline-block; vertical-align: top; user-select: none;}
.ͼ1 .cm-highlightSpace {background-image: radial-gradient(circle at 50% 55%, #aaa 20%, transparent 5%); background-position: center;}
.ͼ1 .cm-highlightTab {background-image: url('data:image/svg+xml,<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="200" height="20"><path stroke="%23888" stroke-width="1" fill="none" d="M1 10H196L190 5M190 15L196 10M197 4L197 16"/></svg>'); background-size: auto 100%; background-position: right 90%; background-repeat: no-repeat;}
.ͼ1 .cm-trailingSpace {background-color: #ff332255;}
.ͼ1 .cm-button {vertical-align: middle; color: inherit; font-size: 70%; padding: .2em 1em; border-radius: 1px;}
.ͼ2 .cm-button:active {background-image: linear-gradient(#b4b4b4, #d0d3d6);}
.ͼ2 .cm-button {background-image: linear-gradient(#eff1f5, #d9d9df); border: 1px solid #888;}
.ͼ3 .cm-button:active {background-image: linear-gradient(#111, #333);}
.ͼ3 .cm-button {background-image: linear-gradient(#393939, #111); border: 1px solid #888;}
.ͼ1 .cm-textfield {vertical-align: middle; color: inherit; font-size: 70%; border: 1px solid silver; padding: .2em .5em;}
.ͼ2 .cm-textfield {background-color: white;}
.ͼ3 .cm-textfield {border: 1px solid #555; background-color: inherit;}
.ͼ4 .cm-line ::selection, .ͼ4 .cm-line::selection {background-color: transparent !important;}
.ͼ4 .cm-line {caret-color: transparent !important;}
.ͼ4 .cm-content :focus::selection, .ͼ4 .cm-content :focus ::selection {background-color: Highlight !important;}
.ͼ4 .cm-content :focus {caret-color: initial !important;}
.ͼ4 .cm-content {caret-color: transparent !important;}

              .cm-lineNumbers, .cm-foldGutter { visibility: hidden; }

            }
          </style><div><div class="cm-editor ͼ1 ͼ2 ͼ4"><div class="cm-announced" aria-live="polite"></div><div tabindex="-1" class="cm-scroller"><div class="cm-gutters cm-gutters-before" aria-hidden="true" style="min-height: 434px; position: sticky;"><div class="cm-gutter cm-lineNumbers"><div class="cm-gutterElement" style="height: 0px; visibility: hidden; pointer-events: none;">99</div><div class="cm-gutterElement" style="height: 14px;">1</div><div class="cm-gutterElement" style="height: 14px;">2</div><div class="cm-gutterElement" style="height: 14px;">3</div><div class="cm-gutterElement" style="height: 14px;">4</div><div class="cm-gutterElement" style="height: 14px;">5</div><div class="cm-gutterElement" style="height: 14px;">6</div><div class="cm-content" style="-moz-tab-size: 4;" role="textbox" aria-multiline="true" aria-readonly="true" data-language="toml"><div class="cm-line"><span class="tok-propertyName">api_version</span> = <span class="tok-string">"2026-01"</span></div><div class="cm-line"><br></div><div class="cm-line"><span class="tok-atom">[[extensions]]</span></div><div class="cm-line"><span class="tok-propertyName">name</span> = <span class="tok-string">"t:name"</span></div><div class="cm-line"><span class="tok-propertyName">handle</span> = <span class="tok-string">"my-discount-function"</span></div><div class="cm-line"><span class="tok-propertyName">type</span> = <span class="tok-string">"function"</span></div><div class="cm-line"><span class="tok-propertyName">uid</span> = <span class="tok-string">"aad83b55-634c-f168-7ece-00d492c84058ddd4a6b4"</span></div><div class="cm-line"><br></div><div class="cm-line">  <span class="tok-atom">[[extensions.targeting]]</span></div><div class="cm-line">  <span class="tok-propertyName">target</span> = <span class="tok-string">"cart.lines.discounts.generate.run"</span></div><div class="cm-line">  <span class="tok-propertyName">input_query</span> = <span class="tok-string">"src/run.graphql"</span></div><div class="cm-line">  <span class="tok-propertyName">export</span> = <span class="tok-string">"run"</span></div><div class="cm-line"><br></div><div class="cm-line">  <span class="tok-atom">[extensions.build]</span></div><div class="cm-line">  <span class="tok-propertyName">command</span> = <span class="tok-string">"cargo build --target=wasm32-unknown-unknown --release"</span></div><div class="cm-line">  <span class="tok-propertyName">path</span> = <span class="tok-string">"target/wasm32-unknown-unknown/release/discount.wasm"</span></div><div class="cm-line">  <span class="tok-propertyName">watch</span> = <span class="tok-punctuation">[</span> <span class="tok-string">"src/**/*.rs"</span> <span class="tok-punctuation">]</span></div><div class="cm-line"><br></div><div class="cm-line">  <span class="tok-comment"># note: mutually exclusive to extension.ui.paths</span></div><div class="cm-line">  <span class="tok-atom">[extensions.ui]</span></div><div class="cm-line">  <span class="tok-propertyName">enable_create</span> = <span class="tok-atom">true</span></div><div class="cm-line">  <span class="tok-propertyName">handle</span> = <span class="tok-string">"ui-extension-handle"</span></div><div class="cm-line"><br></div><div class="cm-line">  <span class="tok-comment"># note: mutually exclusive to extension.ui</span></div><div class="cm-line">  <span class="tok-atom">[extensions.ui.paths]</span></div><div class="cm-line">  <span class="tok-propertyName">create</span> = <span class="tok-string">"/discount/function-handle/new"</span></div><div class="cm-line">  <span class="tok-propertyName">details</span> = <span class="tok-string">"/discount/function-handle/:id"</span></div><div class="cm-line"><br></div><div class="cm-line">  <span class="tok-atom">[extensions.input.variables]</span></div><div class="cm-line">  <span class="tok-propertyName">namespace</span> = <span class="tok-string">"my-namespace"</span></div><div class="cm-line">  <span class="tok-propertyName">key</span> = <span class="tok-string">"my-key"</span></div></div><div class="cm-layer cm-layer-above cm-cursorLayer" aria-hidden="true" style="z-index: 150; animation-duration: 1200ms;"></div><div class="cm-layer cm-selectionLayer" aria-hidden="true" style="z-index: -2;"></div></div></div></div><script>(() => {
  const container2 = document.currentScript.parentElement;
  requestAnimationFrame(() => {
    if (!container2.isConnected) return;
    const lineNumbersContainer = container2.querySelector(
      ".cm-lineNumbers"
    );
    const guttersContainer = container2.querySelector(
      ".cm-gutters"
    );
    if (!guttersContainer || !lineNumbersContainer) return;
    guttersContainer.style.minHeight = "0px";
    const lineNumbers2 = [
      ...container2.querySelectorAll(".cm-lineNumbers .cm-gutterElement")
    ].slice(1);
    const lines = [...container2.querySelectorAll(".cm-content .cm-line")];
    const lineBoxes = lines.map((line) => line.getBoundingClientRect());
    for (const [index2, lineBox] of lineBoxes.entries()) {
      const lineNumber = lineNumbers2[index2];
      lineNumber.style.height = `${lineBox.height}px`;
    }
    lineNumbersContainer.style.visibility = "visible";
  });
})()</script></div></div></div></div></aside></section></div></div></div>
<div class="_PageLayoutConstraints_1vcwt_1"><div class="_PageLayoutConstraintsInner_1vcwt_14"><hr class="_SectionDivider_19vap_15"/></div></div>
<div class="_SectionList_19vap_1"><div class="_PageLayoutConstraints_1vcwt_1"><div class="_PageLayoutConstraintsInner_1vcwt_14"><section class="_PageSection_fsk7b_1"><div data-testid="primary-column" class="_PageSectionColumn_fsk7b_17"><h2><div id="graphql-schema-and-versioning" class="_Wrapper_gm9zu_1 group/hashtarget"><a data-markdown="remove" class="_LinkHashTarget_gm9zu_14" href="/docs/api/functions/latest#graphql-schema-and-versioning" data-discover="true"><svg width="20" height="20" aria-hidden="true"><use href="#LinkMedium"></use></svg><span class="visuallyHidden">Anchor to GraphQL schema and versioning</span></a>Graph<wbr/>QL schema and versioning</div></h2><p>Each Function API has a GraphQL schema representation, which you can use to improve your development workflow.
For example, a GraphQL schema can be used with tools like the <a href="https://marketplace.visualstudio.com/items?itemName=GraphQL.vscode-graphql" target="_blank" rel="noreferrer" class="external-link"><span class="external-link-label">VS Code GraphQL </span><span class="external-link-tail"><span class="external-link-tail-word">plugin</span><span class="external-link-icon" aria-hidden="true"></span></span></a> and language-specific code generation tools, such as <a href="https://github.com/graphql-rust/graphql-client" target="_blank" rel="noreferrer" class="external-link"><span class="external-link-label"><code>graphql_client</code></span><span class="external-link-tail"><span class="external-link-tail-word"></span><span class="external-link-icon" aria-hidden="true"></span></span></a> for Rust.</p><p>On creation, each function includes a copy of the GraphQL schema in the <code>schema.graphql</code> file.
We recommend that your function always uses the latest supported schema version.</p></div><aside data-testid="secondary-column" class="_PageSectionColumn_fsk7b_17"></aside></section></div></div><div class="_PageLayoutConstraints_1vcwt_1"><div class="_PageLayoutConstraintsInner_1vcwt_14"><section class="_PageSection_fsk7b_1"><div data-testid="primary-column" class="_PageSectionColumn_fsk7b_17"><h3><div id="versioning" class="_Wrapper_gm9zu_1 group/hashtarget"><a data-markdown="remove" class="_LinkHashTarget_gm9zu_14" href="/docs/api/functions/latest#versioning" data-discover="true"><svg width="20" height="20" aria-hidden="true"><use href="#LinkMedium"></use></svg><span class="visuallyHidden">Anchor to Versioning</span></a>Versioning</div></h3><p>Function APIs are <a href="/docs/api/usage/versioning">versioned</a>.
Updates are released quarterly, and you can find details about changes in the <a href="https://shopify.dev/changelog">developer changelog</a>.</p><p>Your function will be configured for the latest version when:</p><ul>
<li>You update the version of the API specified in your <a href="#configuration">configuration file</a>.</li>
<li><a href="#generating-the-latest-schema">You generate the latest schema</a>.</li>
<li>If you&#x27;re using JavaScript, you&#x27;ve regenerated types based on your input query.</li>
</ul></div><aside data-testid="secondary-column" class="_PageSectionColumn_fsk7b_17"><div class="_Card_q9ijc_1 _DefaultCard_q9ijc_11 Theme-Docs Mode-Dim _CodeBlockContainer_q9ub5_1 CodeBlockContainerHeight _MdxCodeblock_ebwmn_1"><header class="_CardHeader_q9ijc_107"><div class="_TitleBar_1vdkz_1"><h2 class="_Heading_1vdkz_20">Update API version in shopify.extension.toml</h2></div><div class="_CardActionBar_q9ijc_38"><span aria-describedby="_R_15kpcm75_" data-state="closed"><button type="button" class="_CardActionButton_q9ijc_47 _CodeBlockActionButton_q9ub5_21"><svg width="20" height="20" class="_CodeBlockActionIcon_q9ub5_17" aria-hidden="true"><use href="#CopyMedium"></use></svg><span class="_CardActionButtonLabel_q9ijc_79">Copy</span></button></span></div></header><div class="_CodeBlockContent_q9ub5_34"><div data-language="toml" class="_Editor_1kljl_1" style="--gutter-padding:var(--size-100)"><div><style>

          </style><div><div class="cm-editor ͼ1 ͼ2 ͼ4"><div class="cm-announced" aria-live="polite"></div><div tabindex="-1" class="cm-scroller"><div class="cm-gutters cm-gutters-before" aria-hidden="true" style="min-height: 14px; position: sticky;"><div class="cm-gutter cm-lineNumbers"><div class="cm-gutterElement" style="height: 0px; visibility: hidden; pointer-events: none;">9</div><div class="cm-gutterElement" style="height: 14px;">1</div></div></div><div spellcheck="false" autocorrect="off" autocapitalize="off" writingsuggestions="false" translate="no" contenteditable="false" class="cm-content" style="-moz-tab-size: 4;" role="textbox" aria-multiline="true" aria-readonly="true" data-language="bash"><div class="cm-line"><span class="tok-variableName">shopify</span> <span class="tok-variableName">app</span> <span class="tok-keyword">function</span> <span class="tok-variableName">schema</span></div></div><div class="cm-layer cm-layer-above cm-cursorLayer" aria-hidden="true" style="z-index: 150; animation-duration: 1200ms;"></div><div class="cm-layer cm-selectionLayer" aria-hidden="true" style="z-index: -2;"></div></div></div></div><script>(() => {
  const container2 = document.currentScript.parentElement;
  requestAnimationFrame(() => {
    if (!container2.isConnected) return;
    const lineNumbersContainer = container2.querySelector(
      ".cm-lineNumbers"
    );
    const guttersContainer = container2.querySelector(
      ".cm-gutters"
    );
    if (!guttersContainer || !lineNumbersContainer) return;
    guttersContainer.style.minHeight = "0px";
    const lineNumbers2 = [
      ...container2.querySelectorAll(".cm-lineNumbers .cm-gutterElement")
    ].slice(1);
    const lines = [...container2.querySelectorAll(".cm-content .cm-line")];
    const lineBoxes = lines.map((line) => line.getBoundingClientRect());
    for (const [index2, lineBox] of lineBoxes.entries()) {
      const lineNumber = lineNumbers2[index2];
      lineNumber.style.height = `${lineBox.height}px`;
    }
    lineNumbersContainer.style.visibility = "visible";
  });
})()</script></div></div></div></div><div class="_Card_q9ijc_1 _DefaultCard_q9ijc_11 Theme-Docs Mode-Dim _CodeBlockContainer_q9ub5_1 CodeBlockContainerHeight _MdxCodeblock_ebwmn_1"><header class="_CardHeader_q9ijc_107"><div class="_TitleBar_1vdkz_1"><h2 class="_Heading_1vdkz_20">Regenerate types (JavaScript-based functions only)</h2></div><div class="_CardActionBar_q9ijc_38"><span aria-describedby="_R_17kpcm75_" data-state="closed"><button type="button" class="_CardActionButton_q9ijc_47 _CodeBlockActionButton_q9ub5_21"><svg width="20" height="20" class="_CodeBlockActionIcon_q9ub5_17" aria-hidden="true"><use href="#CopyMedium"></use></svg><span class="_CardActionButtonLabel_q9ijc_79">Copy</span></button></span></div></header><div class="_CodeBlockContent_q9ub5_34"><div data-language="bash" class="_Editor_1kljl_1" style="--gutter-padding:var(--size-100)"><div><style>

If you change your target API version, then the Function API schema might have changed between versions.</p><p>To generate the latest GraphQL schema for your function, use the <a href="/docs/api/shopify-cli/app/app-function-schema"><code>function schema</code> command</a>.
This command outputs the latest schema based on your function&#x27;s API type and version to the <code>schema.graphql</code> file.</p><p>You can output the generated GraphQL schema to <code>STDOUT</code> by passing the <code>--stdout</code> flag, or save the output to a different file or pipe it into a code generation tool, if needed.</p></div><aside data-testid="secondary-column" class="_PageSectionColumn_fsk7b_17"><div class="_Card_q9ijc_1 _DefaultCard_q9ijc_11 Theme-Docs Mode-Dim _CodeBlockContainer_q9ub5_1 CodeBlockContainerHeight _MdxCodeblock_ebwmn_1"><header class="_CardHeader_q9ijc_107"><div class="_TitleBar_1vdkz_1"><h2 class="_Heading_1vdkz_20">Generate latest schema</h2></div><div class="_CardActionBar_q9ijc_38"><span aria-describedby="_R_15mpcm75_" data-state="closed"><button type="button" class="_CardActionButton_q9ijc_47 _CodeBlockActionButton_q9ub5_21"><svg width="20" height="20" class="_CodeBlockActionIcon_q9ub5_17" aria-hidden="true"><use href="#CopyMedium"></use></svg><span class="_CardActionButtonLabel_q9ijc_79">Copy</span></button></span></div></header><div class="_CodeBlockContent_q9ub5_34"><div data-language="bash" class="_Editor_1kljl_1" style="--gutter-padding:var(--size-100)"><div><style>
